checks.description: Do not add dependencies from Domain to other layers, or from Application to Infrastructure or Api.
Do not add sample products, orders, todos, invoices, customers, or fake aggregates.
Do not apply EF Core migrations on application startup. Generate reviewed idempotent SQL scripts.
Do not commit connection strings, passwords, client secrets, certificates, or tokens.
Use xUnit v3, FluentAssertions 7.2.x, NSubstitute, Testcontainers.MsSql, Respawn, and coverlet.
